claims.summary: Resonance texture telemetry must remain an additive shared wire contract with advisory defaults.
claims.disposition: verify the canonical protocol DTO, conversion path, and compatibility fixtures

claims.summary: Missing texture fields should default without breaking legacy packets.
claims.disposition: verify legacy fixture acceptance and field-presence metadata

claims.summary: The resonance fingerprint has an exact 32-byte integrity contract.
claims.disposition: verify strict fingerprint width validation and deterministic hash tests

claims.summary: Untyped neural JSON should remain isolated from the canonical typed provenance path.
claims.disposition: verify compatibility-only Value handling and typed observation conversion

claims.summary: Cadence and timestamp fields need explicit arithmetic and presence handling.
claims.disposition: verify checked cadence arithmetic, timestamp conversion, and captured packet parity
